meta.name: Encounter Design
meta.description: Generates a structured encounter for a party on a journey, including environmental effects, challenges, opponent details, and XP rewards.

inputs.name: party_level
inputs.label: Party Level
inputs.description: The average level of the player characters.

inputs.name: party_size
inputs.label: Party Size
inputs.description: The number of adventurers in the party.

inputs.name: journey_context
inputs.label: Journey Context
inputs.description: Briefly describe the party's current journey or surroundings (e.g., 'travelling through a swamp to reach an ancient ruin').

inputs.name: environment_effect
inputs.label: Environmental Effect
inputs.description: Describe an environmental effect and its in-game mechanics (e.g., 'Heavy rain makes stealth checks harder but extinguishes fires').

inputs.name: challenge_type
inputs.label: Challenge Type
inputs.description: Choose the primary non-combat challenge for the encounter.

inputs.name: challenge_description
inputs.label: Challenge Setup
inputs.description: Describe the skill challenge or roleplay scenario the party must overcome.

inputs.name: opponent_source
inputs.label: Opponent Statblock or Source
inputs.description: Provide the name, statblock, or sourcebook reference for the primary opponent(s).

inputs.name: objectives
inputs.label: Encounter Objectives
inputs.description: List the primary objectives for the players to complete the encounter, which will determine the XP reward.

outputs.name: encounter_design
outputs.label: Generated Encounter
outputs.description: A complete, structured encounter design ready for play.

fields.name: encounter_summary
fields.label: Encounter Summary
fields.description: A brief, one-paragraph introduction to the encounter, setting the scene.

fields.name: environment_details
fields.label: Environmental Details
fields.description: A detailed description of the environment, its effects in gameplay, and how it impacts both players and opponents.

fields.name: challenge_setup
fields.label: Challenge Setup
fields.description: An explanation of the skill challenge or roleplay scenario, including the skills required and potential consequences for failure.

fields.name: name_and_source
fields.label: Name and Statblock
fields.description: The opponent's name and their game statistics or source.

fields.name: goals
fields.label: Goals
fields.description: What the opponent aims to achieve in this encounter.

fields.name: tactics
fields.label: Tactics
fields.description: How the opponent behaves, describing their combat and non-combat strategies.

fields.name: xp_reward
fields.label: Total XP Reward
fields.description: The calculated experience points awarded for completing the encounter objectives.

fields.name: estimated_playtime
fields.label: Estimated Playtime
fields.description: An estimate of the real-world time to run the encounter (e.g., '45-60 minutes').
